name: design-hub
description: Design Hub integration for Codex with confirmed read and write access.

interface.shortDescription: Read and update Design Hub workspaces, pages and specs from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex access to Design Hub workspaces, views, table of contents, pages, search, confirmed page writes, and workspace assets through a local MCP server that reuses the existing Design Hub CLI authentication flow.
defaultPrompt: Find the relevant Design Hub implementation plan.
Search Design Hub for architecture notes.
Create a Design Hub page with an Orchestrator workflow.
